commands.review_summary:
The PR adds release-only `strip -x` handling for packaged app/helper/widget executables and wires a focused packaging-strip script into `make check`.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a release-packaging cleanup PR, not a bug report. The PR body gives concrete after-change size and smoke-validation evidence instead of a failing reproduction path.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; this PR is ready for ordinary maintainer review and release-machine validation.

target.title: [codex] Reduce release app bundle size
target.body:
## Summary
- Strip packaged release binaries with `strip -x` before signing the app bundle
- Keep debug packaging unstripped for local debugging
- Add a small packaging script test and include it in `make check`

## Why
The current release app bundle is dominated by Swift symbol tables in the packaged executables. Stripping non-global symbols from release binaries keeps the app runnable and dSYM UUIDs intact while reducing the installed bundle size substantially.

## Validation
- `./Scripts/test_package_strip.sh`
- `./Scripts/test_package_product_paths.sh`
- `git diff --check`
- Installed Swift 6.2.4 locally via swiftly and built the SwiftPM release products from source; Xcode 16.2 cannot complete the WidgetExtension project because it still uses Swift 6.0 for package resolution, so I completed a local smoke bundle with the source-built stripped app/CLI and known-good release widget/Sparkle assets.
- Smoke-tested `/tmp/codexbar-source-validate/CodexBar.app`: `codesign --verify --deep --strict`, `CodexBarCLI --version`, `CodexBarCLI --help`, and `open -n` with the app process staying alive.

## Size check
Using the latest public universal release as a baseline and applying the same strip step locally:
- `CodexBar.app`: ~152 MB → ~86 MB
- zip: 48,598,232 bytes → 38,769,894 bytes (~9.4 MiB / 20.2% smaller)

For the source-built arm64 smoke bundle, the stripped app executable was 17 MB and the stripped CLI helper was 11 MB.
target.author: jieshu666
